testcase.name: Debug: Test login with both users
testcase.system-out:
Testing tecnico@hiansa.com... After tecnico login, URL: http://localhost:3000/login? ✗ tecnico@hiansa.com login failed, URL: http://localhost:3000/login?
Testing new.user@example.com... After new.user login, URL: http://localhost:3000/login ✗ new.user@example.com login failed, stayed on login page

testcase.name: @p0 Story 0.1: Next.js Project Setup Validation › E0-1.1-001: should have Next.js 15.0.3 in package.json
